description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a slender build, depicted in a dynamic walking pose. The figure's arms are bent at the elbows, with one arm swinging forward and the other back, suggesting mid-stride movement. The legs are positioned apart, with one foot slightly lifted as if taking a step. The clothing appears form-fitting, with no visible accessories or outerwear, and the overall silhouette is streamlined. The head is slightly forward, in line with a natural walking posture. There are no visible carried objects or distinguishing features such as hats or bags.
description: A slender adult pedestrian in a mid-stride walking pose, arms and legs positioned to suggest movement, wearing form-fitting clothing.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the back, with the head and upper back visible, and the arms and legs extending outward in a walking motion.
description_view_1: A side view showing the profile of the pedestrian, highlighting the forward swing of one arm and the stride of the legs.
description_view_2: The lower body and one leg are most prominent, emphasizing the lifted foot and the dynamic walking stance.
description_view_3: A partial front view, with the leading arm and leg visible, giving a sense of forward movement.
